full_text:
Wang Tan 王澹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Tan (王澹)was born in Ba. A local gentleman who rose to high office under Liu Zhang. Wang Tan was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
